body_txt: Two guys are fighting. One of them decides to show his superior fighting skill by:  May coincide with Multi-Armed Multitasking or Master of the Levitating Blades , if the character would be capable of wielding many weapons at once. Sub-Trope of Just Toying with Them . Compare With My Hands Tied , Ignored Enemy , Badass Back , This Is No Time for Knitting , Epic Battle Boredom , The Snack Is More Interesting , Kinda Busy Here . Can overlap with Flynning . Super-Trope of Combat Uninterruptus (having a conversation during a fight). See also Coitus Uninterruptus . May involve Nonchalant Dodging or Juggle Fu . Can also be a relative of Offhand Backhand .
